10.reason: This loop condition (i < strlen(s)-1) prevents processing the last character; after the loop finishes, the last character is never printed, causing the output to miss the final character 'F' in the test case.

12.reason: [The condition 'a'<=s[i-1]&&s[i+1]<='z' does not ensure both characters are lowercase; it allows mixed cases like 'A'-'z'. It should check both ends are in [a-z].]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Error: Incomplete range check. Should also verify s[i-1]<='z' and s[i+1]>='a'. Otherwise, characters like 'Z' (which is <= 'z') can incorrectly satisfy the condition.]
